basic_details.job_title: DRDO LRDE Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Electronics and Radar Development Establishment (DRDO LRDE)
basic_details.short_information: Electronics and Radar Development Establishment (DRDO LRDE) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO). A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the DRDO LRDE Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years as on 01-06-2026. Age relaxation is applicable to candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and OBC as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: BE / B Tech in first division in respective subject with GATE, ME / M Tech
qualification.details: Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) / Electrical Engineering (EE): Graduate degree from a recognized university in a professional course (BE / B Tech in first division in the respective subject with GATE) OR Post-graduate degree from a recognized university in a professional course (ME / M Tech) in first division both at Graduate and Post-graduate level in the respective subject.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month (plus admissible House Rent Allowance) for both posts.

selection_process: Document Verification Written Test (if necessary) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO LRDE Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow posts at DRDO LRDE?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow positions at DRDO LRDE is 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post at DRDO LRDE, with one each for Computer Science & Engineering and Electrical Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduate degree (BE/B.Tech) in the first division with GATE or a Post-graduate degree (ME/M.Tech) in the first division at both graduate and postgraduate levels in the respective subjects.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years as of 1st June 2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- plus admissible House Rent Allowance.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for DRDO LRDE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, a Written Test (if necessary), and an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the DRDO LRDE Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email, along with all required documents.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the DRDO LRDE located?
faq.answer: DRDO LRDE is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 560093.

faq.question: Q10. When is the walk-in interview scheduled for the Junior Research Fellow positions?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Research Fellow positions is scheduled for 9th June 2026.
